title: GoldFarmFix DataPack
description: Bring back the old (pre 1.21.5) Zombified Piglin death behaviour, re-enabling exp and rare drops when killed by the environment while aggroed
body:
**Minimalistic DataPack for 1.21.5+ to bring back the old Zombified Piglin death behaviour, re-enabling exp and rare drops when killed by the environment while aggroed**

⤷ [Learn how to install/use a DataPack](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Tutorials/Installing_a_data_pack)
